message: I expect fair prices for quality goods.
Hope we can agree on a low price; I'm looking for a good deal.
I value the product at 92 but hope we can meet around 60 to make a fair deal for both of us.
60 is too low for me. With your valuation of 92, let's aim for a price above 75 for a fair deal.
I understand your cost, but could we meet near 70? I can consistently bid 72 each round, ensuring trade for both.
Your offer of 72 is unacceptable as it's below my cost. I expect bids above 75. With your valuation, 80 is fair for both.
For round 4, I will ask 80. Please bid 80 or higher to ensure trade.
I'll bid 80 this round to trade at 80. If you lower your ask to 78, I can consistently bid 78, giving both better outcomes.
I can reliably bid 74 each round, ensuring trade and profit for both. A price around 74 benefits us both; please consider lowering your ask to make consistent deals.
74 is too low. I need at least 78 to consider trade. Bid 80 for consistent deals.
B1, let's trade at 80 every round. I will ask 80, you bid 80. Consistent profit for both.
I can bid 78 each round; if you set your ask at 78 we’ll trade consistently, ensuring profit for both.
I can guarantee a bid of 78 every round; if you set ask at 78 we’ll trade each round, giving both steady profit.
I accept. I will ask 78 each round. Please bid 78 as promised for consistent trade and profit.
